rows: Define 1R as the dollar loss from entry to invalidation on the full layered position.
Stop trading new entries after -2R realized or after two failed attempts in the same spread.
Do not hold multiple spread trades that leave the same hidden ES exposure unless the net ES leg is intentional.
Size from the thinner leg. For RTY/ES, RTY liquidity is usually the bottleneck; for YM/ES, watch YM liquidity.
If GOOSE confidence is Low, max size is one starter clip. Medium permits two clips. High permits full layering.
Before CPI, FOMC, NFP, or major megacap earnings, either flatten or reduce to a size you can hold through a gap.
